abort.already_configured: This MEGA S4 bucket is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to MEGA S4. Check your region and network connection.
error.invalid_credentials: Cannot access bucket with the provided credentials. Check your Access Key ID and Secret Access Key.

user.title: Add MEGA S4 bucket
user.description: Configure a MEGA S4 Object Storage bucket as a backup location. You need an active MEGA S4 subscription and IAM credentials.

data_description.access_key_id: IAM Access Key ID from your MEGA S4 account.
data_description.secret_access_key: IAM Secret Access Key from your MEGA S4 account.
data_description.bucket: The S4 bucket name. It must already exist.
data_description.prefix: Optional folder prefix to store backups in, for example 'homeassistant/backups'.

cannot_connect.message: Cannot connect to MEGA S4 endpoint.

invalid_credentials.message: Cannot access the bucket with the provided credentials.
